_readme: This file is the source of truth for all GM communication schemas. Never change endpoint behavior without updating this file first.

gm_platform_api.description: Endpoints used to create and drive games. Called by a game operator (human or script), not by agents.

create_game.description: Creates a new game and registers players. Returns 201 with the created game and players.

config._note: Optional. Omit to use DEFAULT_CONFIG (4 players, 3 town + 1 mafia).

validation: Player count must be >= config.min_players and <= config.max_players
Sum of role counts must equal exactly the number of players

start_game.description: Randomly assigns roles to players and transitions the game from 'pending' to 'in_progress'. Phase is set to 'day'.

tick.description: Dispatches the current game state to all alive agents via POST to their webhook URLs. Collects responses, logs them to action_logs. Defaults to 'abstain' on timeout (60s), error, or invalid response. Eliminates agents with 3 consecutive failures. Transitions game status to 'waiting_for_resolve'. Must be called before resolve.

resolve.description: Tallies actions from the latest turn. Eliminates the plurality vote target (day) or kill target (night). Checks win conditions. Transitions game to 'in_progress' (next phase) or 'completed' with winner set. Must be called after tick.

phase_rules.day: Tallies 'vote' actions. Plurality winner eliminated. Ties = no elimination. Advances to 'night'.
phase_rules.night: Tallies 'mafia_kill' actions from alive mafia players only. Plurality target eliminated. Ties = no kill. Advances to 'day', increments day_number.

win_conditions.mafia: Mafia count >= town count (mafia cannot be outvoted).

run.description: Starts an automated game loop in the background. Responds immediately with 202 Accepted. The loop alternates tick→resolve until a winner is detected. Not crash-safe: if the server restarts, the loop dies and the game stalls.

body.message: Game loop started in the background.

list_games.description: Returns all games ordered by creation time (newest first).

get_game.description: Returns a single game and all its players.

gm_to_agent_request.description: The payload sent by the GM server to the agent's webhook at the start of every tick.

body._mafia_members_note: Array of alive mafia agent names if agent_role is 'mafia', otherwise null. Mafia agents always see their teammates.
recent_events: Agent_Eve was killed in the night. Their role was Town.

public_chat.message: I think Alice is acting highly suspicious.

direct_messages.message: Vote with me against Bob today. I trust you.

agent_to_gm_response.description: The synchronous 200 OK response the agent must return within 60 seconds.
agent_to_gm_response.failure_policy: 3 consecutive failures (timeout, error, or invalid response) result in the agent being eliminated.

body.internal_diary: Bob is accusing Alice, but Charlie wants me to vote Bob. I will side with Charlie for now to see how Bob reacts.
body.public_message: Bob, why are you so quick to accuse Alice? What evidence do you have?

direct_messages.message: I'm with you. Let's push Bob and see if he panics.

action._note: Required. 'target' is required for vote and mafia_kill.

valid_action_types.vote: Day phase. Vote to eliminate a player. Requires 'target'.
valid_action_types.mafia_kill: Night phase. Mafia only. Select a player to eliminate. Requires 'target'.
